heading: Authorization of United States subscription to stock; authorization of appropriations
label: 290i–10 Authorization of United States subscription to stock; authorization of appropriations
notes: Codificationis based on section 301 of title III of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Section 1343 of Pub. L. 97–35Pub. L. 100–202Dec. 11, 1987

Fifth General Capital Increase, , , 1501A–122, provided in part that the Secretary of the Treasury may effect the United States participation in the fifth general capital increase of the African Development Bank, and authorized $40,847,011 to be appropriated without fiscal year limitation for payment by the Secretary for paid-in capital of the Bank and $639,932,485 to be appropriated without fiscal year limitation for payment by the Secretary for callable capital of the Bank.Pub. L. 106–113, div. B, § 1000(a)(2) [title V, § 594]113 Stat. 1535Nov. 29, 1999
amendments: Fifth General Capital Increase, , , 1501A–122, provided in part that the Secretary of the Treasury may effect the United States participation in the fifth general capital increase of the African Development Bank, and authorized $40,847,011 to be appropriated without fiscal year limitation for payment by the Secretary for paid-in capital of the Bank and $639,932,485 to be appropriated without fiscal year limitation for payment by the Secretary for callable capital of the Bank.Pub. L. 106–113, div. B, § 1000(a)(2) [title V, § 594]113 Stat. 1535Nov. 29, 1999

children.label: a
children.text: The United States Governor of the Bank is authorized to agree to subscribe on behalf of the United States to fifty-nine thousand, six hundred and thirty-two shares of the capital stock of the Bank, except that the subscription shall be effective only to such extent or in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriations Acts.

children.label: b
children.text: In order to pay for the United States subscription authorized in subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, $719,370,633, for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.
